name: Code
description: An inline or block code display element with optional syntax highlighting.

props.name: block
props.description: Display as a full-width block with copy button. When `false`, renders as inline `<code>`.

props.name: language
props.description: Language identifier for syntax highlighting (e.g. `'typescript'`, `'html'`). Requires `KbCode.highlighter` to be set.

props.name: filename
props.description: File name displayed in a header bar above block code. Only visible when `block` is true.
